calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-02-2025 Off Calendar

Notice Of Application And Plaintiffs Application For Default Judgment And Attorney Fees
Off Calendar Mar-21-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for request for judgment against Defendant 1554 Market Street Developement, LLC.

Dept:505; Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: K.Valdes ; Proceedings reported by "For the Record" commencing at 9:51:10 a.m. and concluding at 10:07:43 a.m.(D505)

Patrick Whitehorn, Esq. representing Plaintiff Precision Tile and Granite, Inc..
Marcel Souza, sworn to testify on behalf of the Plaintiff.

Counsel to provide a summary to the request for judgment.
The Court examines the witness.
Witness confirms states that statements and declaration is true and correct.

Good cause appearing, the Court finds in favor of the Plaintiff and againsts defendant and grants judgment as follows:
The Plaintiff shall recover from the Defendant:
Damages $30,000.00
Costs $733.60
Attorney's Fees $77,112.50
Prejudgment interest at 7% $4,332.33
Total Judgment $42,178.43

Proposed judgment as modified signed and executed this day.
